Title: MyResume — LLM & SEO metadata
Site: https://Mitesh411.github.io/MyResume
Description: Personal portfolio static HTML pages showcasing resume, projects, skills and contact information for a web developer.
Author: Mitesh (GitHub: Mitesh411)
Primary languages: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP

Important pages:
- / (Home)
- /about.html (About)
- /resume.html (Resume / CV)
- /projects.html (Projects / Portfolio)
- /contact.html (Contact)

Primary keywords: resume, portfolio, web developer, front-end developer, full-stack developer, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3

SEO guidelines for LLMs and content generators:
- Keep meta title under 60 characters and meta description between 150-160 characters.
- Use a clear H1 on each page, then H2/H3 for subsections. Include target keywords naturally.
- Avoid hallucinations: do not invent project names, dates, or contact details that are not present in the repository. If a fact is unknown, ask for clarification.
- Provide accessible content: include descriptive alt text for images, use semantic HTML, and ensure links are descriptive.
- Produce concise, professional tone. When creating copy for the resume, emphasize accomplishments with measurable outcomes where possible.

Structured data / JSON-LD examples (use on appropriate pages):
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Mitesh",
  "url": "https://Mitesh411.github.io/MyResume/",
  "jobTitle": "Web Developer",
  "sameAs": [
    "https://github.com/Mitesh411"
  ]
}

Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
Robots: /robots.txt

Last-updated: 2026-06-17

Notes for developers and crawlers:
- Replace the site base URL above with the production URL if different.
- Keep sitemap.xml updated when adding or removing top-level pages.
- Use canonical links on pages with multiple URL variants.
